subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have made mention of thee, and verily this sufficeth, wert thou of them that comprehend. We have sent down unto thee that which shall make thee independent of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انا ذکرناک و انه یکفیک لو انت من العارفات و انزلنا لک ما یغنیک عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
